   "reasoning": "I'm sick of empty promises, so I'm only backing things that put money directly in students' pockets or fix the system. Scholarships are a no-brainer - they acknowledge my reality. Funding boosts and transparency reports might actually lead to change, but I'm not holding my breath. Forget attendance mandates, that's just more stick and no carrot.",
